title: LPO Announces Conditional Commitment to Rivian to Support the Construction of EV Manufacturing Facility in Georgia
content: The U.S. Department of Energy's Loan Programs Office (LPO) announced a conditional commitment to Rivian New Horizon, LLC, for a direct loan of up to $6.57 billion. This funding will support the development and construction of Project Horizon, an electric vehicle (EV) manufacturing facility in Stanton Springs North, Georgia, which will produce mid-sized electric SUVs. The project aims to create up to 9,500 jobs by 2030 and manufacture up to 400,000 vehicles annually, contributing to the Biden-Harris Administrationâ€™s goal of having half of all new vehicles sold by 2030 be zero-emissions. This loan is the first under the Advanced Technology Vehicles Manufacturing (ATVM) Loan Program during the current administration.
author: Analysts Account
